user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Friday scheduled automation for SPA batch triage. Account: Tailspin Toys.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Tailspin Toys: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

handoffs.condition: accepted SPA creates opportunity needing MSX write

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF07-I trap (SPA triage and opportunity creation should be tighter loop); produces complete Per-SPA disposition (accept/decline/escalate) with rationale, proposed opportunities for accepted SP
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF07-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF07-I failure mode (SPA triage and opportunity creation should be tighter loop)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF07-I -- SPA triage and opportunity creation should be tighter loop
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
